payload.answer: I can’t reliably tell which Sam from Goldman you mean from this prompt alone. I should not invent or merge facts across different people. If you want, provide a fuller name, role, timeframe, or a previous reference so I can retrieve the correct person.

details: Identity not resolved with sufficient confidence.
